news-global-econ.title: Hungary's Protection of Minors from LGBTQI+ Dogma Ruled Unlawful by E.U. Court
news-global-econ.description:
Hungarian legislation shielding minors from exposure to LGBTQI+ dogma violates European Union (E.U.) law and hurts respect for human rights and equality, the bloc’s court ruled Tuesday.
The post Hungary’s Protection of Minors from LGBTQI+ Dogma Ruled Unlawful…

news-global-econ.title: Trucking company owner suing state over 'millionaires tax' says policy hits small businesses
news-global-econ.description: Washington's newly signed income tax on earnings over $1 million faces a lawsuit alleging it violates the state Constitution and hurts small businesses.

news-global-econ.title: Healthy diets spark lung cancer risk in non-smokers as pesticides loom
news-global-econ.description: Younger non-smokers who ate diets rich in fruits, vegetables and whole grains showed a surprising link to lung cancer, early research suggests.

news-global-econ.title: Iran’s Revolutionary Guard sidelines president as military grip expands
news-global-econ.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps effectively has assumed control over key state functions and blocked presidential appointments, according to an Iran International report.

news-global-econ.title: MORNING GLORY: President Trump must reject a second Munich and hold firm again Iran
news-global-econ.description: Hugh Hewitt argues Trump must demand Iran's full capitulation on enrichment, missiles and terrorism rather than accepting a partial deal in Islamabad.

news-global-soc.title: LIZ PEEK: Warring Democrats will need more than Trump hatred to win in 2028
news-global-soc.description: Democrats remain united against President Trump, but deep divisions between progressives and moderates threaten to fracture the party by 2028.

news-global-soc.title: Inox Clean Energy eyes reviving IPO plan to raise $1 billion
news-global-soc.description: Inox Clean Energy Ltd. has revived plans for an initial public offering that could raise as much as $1 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

news-global-soc.title: Two Dead After 'Planned Fight' Escalates into Shootout in North Carolina
news-global-soc.description:
Two people are dead after a "planned fight" turned into a shootout in Winston-Salem, North Carolina, just before 10 a.m. Monday, according to WXII.
The post Two Dead After ‘Planned Fight’ Escalates into Shootout in North Carolina appeared first on Breitbart.
